chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.239 of 2007 a/w C.P. Nos.D-2740/2014, 1304/2019, 963/2019, 5814/2022, 01/2023 & 405/2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2075/2007 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.01.2025 M/s. Tahmasp Rasheed Razvi, Abbas Rasheed Razvi and Shoaib Khatiyan, Advocates for the appellant in HCA No.239/2007 and petitioners in C.P. Nos.D-2740/2014 and 963/2019. M/s. Anwar Mansoor Khan and Asim Mansoor Khan, Advocates for the petitioner in C.P. No.D-1304/2019. M/s. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, Advocate for the petitioners in C.P. Nos.D-5814/2022 and 01/2023. Mr. Talha Javed, Advocate for the petitioner in C.P.No.D- 5814/2022. Mr. Sartaj Malkani, Advocate for SBCA. Ms. Rehana, Advocate for Master Plan Department. Mr. Iftikhar Ahmed, Advocate for K-Electric. Mr. Naeem Akhtar Talpur, Addl. A.G. Sindh. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. In HCA No.239 of 2007 by a judicial order, this Larger Bench was formed. Mr. Tahmasp Rasheed Razvi, learned counsel appearing for Syed Haider Imam Rizvi, submits that the suit out of which this appeal has arisen is dismissed. The dismissal of suit has rendered this appeal as infructuous. None of the counsels in attendance has objected to the dismissal of the suit; hence in view of the above, this appeal has served its purpose and has become infructuous and consequently dismissed. In consequence of the dismissal of the appeal, the connected petitions, which were only fixed before this Larger Bench because they were tagged with this appeal, be then placed before the appropriate Benches having jurisdiction within two weeks.

None of the counsels in attendance has objected to the dismissal of the suit; hence in view of the above, this appeal has served its purpose and has become infructuous and consequently dismissed. In consequence of the dismissal of the appeal, the connected petitions, which were only fixed before this Larger Bench because they were tagged with this appeal, be then placed before the appropriate Benches having jurisdiction within two weeks. Interim order passed earlier in the connected petitions, if any, to continue till the next date of hearing. Office is directed to place a copy of this order in all above connected petitions. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE JUDGE Asif
